etymology.description: semantic 父(父) (fù, "father") + phonetic 巴(巴) (bā) -> "dad"
etymology.interpretation: The character 爸 (bà, "dad") combines 父(父) (fù, "father") as the meaning component to indicate paternal relation, with 巴(巴) (bā) providing the sound. This combination specifies an informal or affectionate term for a father.

examples.chinese: 爸爸喜欢钓鱼(爸爸喜歡釣魚)。
我跟爸爸去过很多地方(我跟爸爸去過很多地方)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ gēn bàba qùguò hěn duō dìfāng.
examples.english: I have been to many places with dad.

examples.chinese: 每个周末(每個週末)，爸爸都会带我去公园(爸爸都會帶我去公園)。
examples.pinyin: Měi gè zhōumò，bàba dōu huì dài wǒ qù gōngyuán.
examples.english: Every weekend, dad takes me to the park.
